name: koliko
description: Privacy-first usage analytics for coding agents

scripts.verify: bun run cf:typecheck && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.deploy:production:dry-run: bun run prepare:production-config && bun run build:production && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.deploy:production: bun run prepare:production-config && bun run verify && bun run build:production && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.production.jsonc && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc && bun run smoke:production

DB.description: Koliko stores passkeys, ingestion keys, and usage analytics in this D1 database.

RP_NAME.description: The name shown by passkey prompts. `Koliko` is recommended.

RP_ID.description: The final dashboard hostname without a scheme or path, for example `koliko.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev`. Set this before registering a passkey.

EXPECTED_ORIGIN.description: The exact HTTPS dashboard origin with no trailing slash, for example `https://koliko.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev`.

BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN.description: Generate an independent random value with `openssl rand -base64 32`. Save it: you need it to register the first passkey.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Generate a different random value with `openssl rand -base64 48`. Koliko uses it to sign challenges and sessions.
